subcodes.title: Words to Kinney, Beede, Thompson party, spoken on 1909-07-01
subcodes.first_line: I desire each one of you to become so great that each may guide a country. The friends must now endeavor to attain to such a station... There exist in man two powers.
subcodes.subjects: @self-improvement; self-perfection; discipline, @two aspects of the human soul; the higher and lower natures, @spiritual transformation, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
